Results for VDBA Scaling Analysis

O.W.

2025-11-10

# collate the cvolumes to select the ines with a lot of data
all_volumes <- lapply(species_list, function(x){
  vol <- fread(file.path(x, paste0(basename(x), "_volume.csv")))
  vol$Species <- basename(x)
  vol
})
all_volumes <- rbindlist(all_volumes)

big_volumes <- all_volumes[all_volumes$volume > 24, ]

Methods

  • 37 species datasets of raw tri-axial accelerometer data.
  • Formatted to standard data structure
  • Smoothed outliers with a butterworth filter (cutoff_freq, 0.5 Hz, to remove only sudden spikes)
  • Generated dynamic VDBA by removing static acceleration (either as a rolling average of 10 seconds of VDBA for continuous data or as the average of the burst)
  • Separated instances into active and inactive categories such that all instances with a rolling standard deviation (measure of flatness in the rolling window) in the botton 25% were classed as inactive.
  • Summarised max and mean VDBA per individual.

Individual Analysis

Where the masses of the exact individual are known. Per species plot and then all known individuals on the same graph.

## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

Ran the stats on the mean and then the max.

# Stats -------------------------------------------------------------------
mean_model <- lmer(log10(meanVDBA) ~ LogMass * threshold + (1 | Dataset), data = all_data)
summary(mean_model)
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: log10(meanVDBA) ~ LogMass * threshold + (1 | Dataset)
##    Data: all_data
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: 29.2
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -2.96940 -0.66305  0.00196  0.44879  3.13951 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups   Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  Dataset  (Intercept) 0.09547  0.3090  
##  Residual             0.05708  0.2389  
## Number of obs: 126, groups:  Dataset, 5
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                            Estimate Std. Error        df t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                -0.18814    0.51994  12.65817  -0.362    0.723    
## LogMass                    -0.09096    0.12015  15.68713  -0.757    0.460    
## thresholdall               -0.25435    0.23802 116.56324  -1.069    0.287    
## thresholdinactive          -1.54568    0.23802 116.56324  -6.494 2.14e-09 ***
## LogMass:thresholdall       -0.04642    0.06011 116.56324  -0.772    0.442    
## LogMass:thresholdinactive   0.08989    0.06011 116.56324   1.495    0.138    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##                (Intr) LogMss thrshldl thrshldn LgMss:thrshldl
## LogMass        -0.960                                        
## thresholdll    -0.229  0.244                                 
## thrshldnctv    -0.229  0.244  0.500                          
## LgMss:thrshldl  0.223 -0.250 -0.976   -0.488                 
## LgMss:thrshldn  0.223 -0.250 -0.488   -0.976    0.500
active_data <- all_data %>% dplyr::filter(threshold == "active")
max_model <- lmer(log10(maxVDBA) ~ LogMass + (1 | Dataset), data = active_data)
summary(max_model)
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: log10(maxVDBA) ~ LogMass + (1 | Dataset)
##    Data: active_data
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: -32.7
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -1.82380 -0.64514  0.04888  0.60687  2.02260 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups   Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  Dataset  (Intercept) 0.07195  0.2682  
##  Residual             0.01676  0.1295  
## Number of obs: 42, groups:  Dataset, 5
## 
## Fixed effects:
##             Estimate Std. Error       df t value Pr(>|t|)
## (Intercept)  0.18782    0.45098 10.40649   0.416    0.686
## LogMass      0.04333    0.10384 12.08206   0.417    0.684
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##         (Intr)
## LogMass -0.962

Single system analysis

Where exact masses are not included (species averages) but all data is collected using the same accelerometer sampling protocol.Repeated for all Clemente datasets and for all Buchmann datasets. # V1: Axivity (Clemente)

## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

Run the stats, mean then max.

# Stats -------------------------------------------------------------------
axivity_model <- lmer(log10(meanVDBA) ~ LogMass * threshold + (1 | Dataset), data = axivity_summaries)
summary(axivity_model)
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: log10(meanVDBA) ~ LogMass * threshold + (1 | Dataset)
##    Data: axivity_summaries
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: -123.2
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##     Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
## -3.1698 -0.5410  0.0339  0.5713  4.1271 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups   Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  Dataset  (Intercept) 0.11499  0.3391  
##  Residual             0.01972  0.1404  
## Number of obs: 162, groups:  Dataset, 8
## 
## Fixed effects:
##                            Estimate Std. Error        df t value Pr(>|t|)    
## (Intercept)                -0.18657    0.63921   6.17292  -0.292   0.7799    
## LogMass                    -0.08927    0.15692   6.19575  -0.569   0.5895    
## thresholdall               -0.42882    0.18920 149.70632  -2.267   0.0249 *  
## thresholdinactive          -1.55890    0.18920 149.70632  -8.240    8e-14 ***
## LogMass:thresholdall       -0.00350    0.04643 149.70632  -0.075   0.9400    
## LogMass:thresholdinactive   0.04897    0.04643 149.70632   1.055   0.2933    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##                (Intr) LogMss thrshldl thrshldn LgMss:thrshldl
## LogMass        -0.982                                        
## thresholdll    -0.148  0.146                                 
## thrshldnctv    -0.148  0.146  0.500                          
## LgMss:thrshldl  0.146 -0.148 -0.990   -0.495                 
## LgMss:thrshldn  0.146 -0.148 -0.495   -0.990    0.500
active_data <- axivity_summaries %>% dplyr::filter(threshold == "active")
max_model <- lmer(log10(maxVDBA) ~ LogMass + (1 | Dataset), data = active_data)
summary(max_model)
## Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
## lmerModLmerTest]
## Formula: log10(maxVDBA) ~ LogMass + (1 | Dataset)
##    Data: active_data
## 
## REML criterion at convergence: -55
## 
## Scaled residuals: 
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -1.96789 -0.64074 -0.05868  0.64328  2.29322 
## 
## Random effects:
##  Groups   Name        Variance Std.Dev.
##  Dataset  (Intercept) 0.02194  0.1481  
##  Residual             0.01401  0.1184  
## Number of obs: 54, groups:  Dataset, 8
## 
## Fixed effects:
##             Estimate Std. Error       df t value Pr(>|t|)  
## (Intercept)  0.63002    0.30959  6.57967   2.035   0.0839 .
## LogMass     -0.03041    0.07639  6.67288  -0.398   0.7030  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Correlation of Fixed Effects:
##         (Intr)
## LogMass -0.983

All species pooled

All species, with approximate/average masses.

## the `.groups` argument.
